chunks.title: Construction of the Altar and Laver
chunks.reason: Describes the physical construction and materials of the bronze altar and the laver.

chunks.title: Dimensions and Materials of the Court
chunks.reason: Provides a detailed inventory of the court's hangings, pillars, bases, and gate screen.

chunks.title: Inventory Summary and Craftsmen
chunks.reason: Lists the total materials used, names the chief craftsmen, and summarizes the allocation of resources.
